Headline: #50 Damen Temporary Northbound Reroute near Damen/Wellington
ShortDescription: Northbound 50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, Diversey, Ashland, Belmont and Damen: due to, street blockage near Damen/Wellington.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, Diversey, Ashland, Belmont and Damen: due to, street blockage near Damen/Wellington.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Blue Line trains bypassing Cicero/Congress Station
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running, but not stopping at Cicero/Congress due to police activity, in both directions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running, but not stopping at Cicero/Congress due to police activity, in both directions.

Please consider other service service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes and uses to other rail lines. These may include these buses:

  • #54 Cicero

We apologize for this inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
